'''Jacob Witkin''' was an actor who portrayed [[Morgan Katarn]] in the cutscenes of ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]'', and he provided the voice for the character in the sequel, [[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast|''Jedi Outcast'']]. Morgan Katarn's appearances in the subsequent games are based on Witkin's looks.
